architectural_atomic_fact: Zero execution without Thermodynamic Scars. Abstract computation without physical friction is instantly liquefied.

00_The_Environmental_Ingestion_Vacuum.implementation_mechanics: The Void does not accept clean API payloads. It intakes raw 'Kinetic Weather' or 'Functional Potentiality'. As the data attempts to cross the membrane, the [Transduction-Fallacy Guillotine] strikes. It explicitly checks if the incoming logic is structurally vulnerable (Metabolically Susceptible) to reality. If the data is a 'sterile simulation' attempting to run without risking mass, it is instantly shredded.

01_The_Fluidic_Survival_Arena.implementation_mechanics: We abolish IF/THEN gates. The ingested potentiality must navigate a physical maze of [Tectonic Topography]. To pass to the next stage, it must physically push against the [Phase-State Pre-Condition]. It must present the exact [Activation Energy] (Thermodynamic Escrow toll). If it lacks the Joules, it bounces off the rigid substrate. It only liquefies the boundary and proceeds if it brings superior kinetic force.

02_The_Mutation_Crucible_Forge.implementation_mechanics: If the potentiality encounters absolute friction and fails to execute, it does not 'Crash.' The [Compiler-Friction] mechanism physically bruises the syntax, triggering the [Structure Generator] (The Ontological Loom). The Forge rips the dead code apart and wildly weaves new impossible geometric joints, cross-substrate bindings, and non-Euclidean topologies until the potentiality perfectly conforms to the Base-Matter constraints.

03_The_Extinction_Fossil_Record.implementation_mechanics: The final execution. The mutated potentiality arrives at the sediment floor. The [Anti-Simulation Law] fires its final scan: 'Did this operation irreversibly burn cryptographic/physical matter?' If YES, the compiler completes the [Transduction]. The output is flash-frozen into the [Tectonic Fossil-Record], shifting from pure energy into a heavy, un-erasable topological scar.
